title: Enchantment Runes
description: Remakes the standard galactic alphabet to be 3x3 to better fit with mc's aesthetic
body:
I've recreated the iconic Standard Galactic Alphabet used for minecraft's enchanting table and applied them in game. 

The enchanting table ui and it's particles now feature these new and improved runes! The rune particles even have a slight glint of purple textured into them

Making the SGA 3x3 was meant to standardize the proportions of the letters and allow them to better fit on textures such as armor/trims, skins, beds, banners, capes, blocks, etc without one letter taking up too much space. Runes can also be stacked to form long words to save space!

These rune designs are free to use amongst the mc community! Modpacks, Animations, Expanded texturepacks, you name it, you can do it! Just don't be a jerk and claim my gift as yours alone, it belongs to the community:)
